memoryArtifacts.headline: tree_Moores_Ancestry
memoryArtifacts.description: This document was compiled by Orville Sullivan L6L2-JJB who is a grandson of Carrie Moore and Delos Sullivan, I was given a paper copy and decided to scan it in and create the searchable text form of the document so others may see and use it. I  tagged a number of the people found in the document to make it easier for others to locate.

zh.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel是Solomon Nagel和Julian的女兒，於1806年出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州勒班農。她於1823年3月2日與Johannes Conrad Moore在美國賓夕法尼亞州勒班農喬內斯托結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1860年住在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭戴利 堂史普且於1870年住在美國伊利諾州馬可德卡度。她去世於1876年4月在美國伊利諾州德維特克林頓享年70歲，埋葬在美國伊利諾州德維特克林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel是Solomon Nagel和Julian的女儿，于1806年出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州勒班農。她于1823年3月2日与Johannes Conrad Moore在美国宾夕法尼亚州勒班農喬內斯托结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1860年住在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭戴利 堂史普且于1870年住在美国伊利诺伊州馬可德卡度。她去世于1876年4月在美国伊利诺伊州德維特克林頓享年70岁，埋葬在美国伊利诺伊州德維特克林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Nagel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Heinz, Hans, Otto, Kurt, Armin, Franz, Fritz, Udo, Wilhelm, Aloys.
German, Dutch, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German, Middle Dutch nagel, German Nagel ‘nail’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of nails. Compare Nail .
Germanized form of Sorbian Nahł, Nagł, Nahły, and Nagły: nickname from Upper Sorbian nahły, Lower Sorbian nagły ‘quick’, also ‘hot-tempered’.

variants.name: Nogle
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Nagel   1.

variants.name: Nail
meanings: English: from Middle English naile, nayle ‘nail’ (from Old English nægel), which may, as in modern English, have the senses ‘metal spike, wooden peg’or ‘fingernail, toenail’. Applied as a metonymic occupational name for a maker of nails.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Nagel   ‘nail’.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Nahilo, based on the element nah ‘sufficient, adequate’.

variants.name: Naegele
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Alois, Bernhard, Erwin, Heinz, Hilde, Manfred, Matthias, Wolfgang.
South German (Nägele): variant of Nagel . Compare Nagele .

variants.name: Naegeli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Markus, Otto, Wolfgang.
Swiss German (Nägeli): variant of Nagel .

variants.name: Naugle
meanings: Americanized form of German   Nagel  .

variants.name: Negley
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Naegeli or Nägeli, variants of Nagel . Compare Nagley .

variants.name: Nagele
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Jutta, Erwin, Rainer, Siegfried.
South German (Nägele): variant of Nagel . Compare Naegele .

variants.name: Noggle
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German Nöggel, a variant of Nöckel, a South German topographic name from Nock ‘hill, peak, rock’, or of Nagel 1. See Nock .

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Susana
meanings: From Hebrew. See Susanna .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1813: Lebanon, Pennsylvania, United States

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.
Historical Boundaries: 1831: Macon, Illinois, United States
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

historicEvents.title: Chicago Board of Trade is organized
historicEvents.description: Starting as a voluntary association to help buyers and sellers meet to negotiate and make contracts. The Chicago Board of Trade is one of the oldest futures and options exchanges in the world and it is open 22 hours per day to stay competitive.

historicEvents.title: Simple life to Soldiers
historicEvents.description: Illinois contributed 250,000 soldiers to the Union Army, ranking it fourth in terms of the total men fighting for a single state. Troops mainly fought in the Western side of the Appalachian Mountains, but a few regiments played important roles in the East side. Several thousand Illinoisians died during the war. No major battles were fought in the state, although several towns became sites for important supply depots and navy yards. Not everyone in the state supported the war and there were calls for secession in Southern Illinois several residents. However, the movement for secession soon died after the proposal was blocked.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

en.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel was born in 1806, in Lebanon, Pennsylvania, United States as the daughter of Solomon Nagel and Julian. She married Johannes Conrad Moore on 2 March 1823, in Jonestown, Lebanon, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States in 1860 and Decatur, Macon, Illinois, United States in 1870. She died in April 1876, in Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, United States, at the age of 70, and was buried in Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel est née en 1806, à Lebanon, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, fille de Solomon Nagel et Julian. Elle a épousé Johannes Conrad Moore le 2 mars 1823, à Jonestown, Lebanon, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis en 1860 et à Decatur, Macon, Illinois, États-Unis en 1870. Elle est décédée en avril 1876, à Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, États-Unis, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel wurde 1806 in Lebanon, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten, als Tochter von Solomon Nagel und Julian geboren. Sie hat am 2. März 1823 in Jonestown, Lebanon, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Johannes Conrad Moore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1860 hat sie in Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und 1870 in Decatur, Macon, Illinois, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb im April 1876 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel è nata il nel 1806 nel Lebanon, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America come figlia di Solomon Nagel e Julian. Lei sposato Johannes Conrad Moore il 2 marzo 1823, nel Jonestown, Lebanon, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1860 e nel Decatur, Macon, Illinois, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1870. Morì nel aprile 1876, nel Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Lebanon, Lebanon, Pennsylvania, United S: アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州レバノンレバノン
ja.Longbridge, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania,: アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドリゴニール トウンシュイップロングブリッジ
ja.Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvan: アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドデリー トウンシュイップ
ja.Salem Township, Mercer, Pennsylvania, Un: アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州メルサーサレム トウンシュイップ
ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagelは1806年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州レバノンでSolomon NagelとJulianの娘として生まれた。1823年3月2日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州レバノンジョーネストウンでJohannes Conrad Mooreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1860年にはアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドデリー トウンシュイップに，1870年にはアメリカ合衆国イリノイ州マコンデカトゥルに住んでいた。彼女は1876年4月にアメリカ合衆国イリノイ州デウィットクリントンで70歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国イリノイ州デウィットクリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Longbridge, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania,: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 리곤이어 타운시프 론그브리지
ko.Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvan: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 더리 타운시프
ko.Salem Township, Mercer, Pennsylvania, Un: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 머서 살렘 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel(은)는 1806년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 레바넌에서 Solomon Nagel(와)과 Julian의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1823년 3월 2일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 레바넌 조네스타운에서 Johannes Conrad Moore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1860년도에 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 더리 타운시프에서, 1870년도에 미국 일리노이 주 맥 데카투르에서 살았다. 그녀는 1876년 4월 미국 일리노이 주 디윗 클린턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 일리노이 주 디윗 클린턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel nasceu em 1806, em Lebanon, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América filha de Solomon Nagel e Julian. Ela casou-se com Johannes Conrad Moore em 2 de março de 1823, em Jonestown, Lebanon, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América em 1860 e em Decatur, Macon, Ilinóis, Estados Unidos da América em 1870. Ela faleceu em abril de 1876, em Clinton, DeWitt, Ilinóis, Estados Unidos da América, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Clinton, DeWitt, Ilinóis, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Longbridge, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania,: лонгбридж, лигониир тоуншип, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты
ru.Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvan: дирри тоуншип, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты
ru.Salem Township, Mercer, Pennsylvania, Un: сеилем тоуншип, мирсир, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel родилась в 1806 г. в местности лебанон, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. Её родителей звали Solomon Nagel и Julian. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johannes Conrad Moore 2 марта 1823 г. в местности джоунестоун, лебанон, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности дирри тоуншип, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в 1860 году и в местности декатур, макон, Иллинойс, Соединенные штаты в 1870 году. Она умерла апрель 1876 г. в местности клинтон, дюитт, Иллинойс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности клинтон, дюитт, Иллинойс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Susanna Nagel nació en 1806, en Lebanon, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos como hija de Solomon Nagel y Julian. Se casó con Johannes Conrad Moore el 2 de marzo de 1823, en Jonestown, Lebanon, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos en 1860 y en Decatur, Macon, Illinois, Estados Unidos en 1870. Murió en abril de 1876, en Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Clinton, DeWitt, Illinois, Estados Unidos.
